rules.title: SQLi UNION SELECT extraction
rules.description: Detects OWASP-style UNION SELECT extraction attempts in attacker-controlled input.

rules.title: SQLi boolean authentication bypass
rules.description: Detects classic boolean SQL injection probes used to bypass authentication.

rules.title: SQLi time-based sleep probe
rules.description: Detects obvious time-based SQL injection probes.

rules.title: XSS script tag literal
rules.description: Detects obvious inline script tag payloads.

rules.title: XSS onerror handler literal
rules.description: Detects common onerror event-handler XSS payloads.

rules.title: Command injection shell execution
rules.description: Detects direct shell execution strings frequently used in command injection.

rules.title: Windows command execution
rules.description: Detects cmd.exe invocation frequently used in command injection.

rules.title: Remote payload downloader
rules.description: Detects simple downloader strings used in post-exploitation payload fetches.
